vc_checking.summary: All three cleaned manual obligations are semantically provable under the current recursive circular doubly-linked-list specification. The entail witness is definitional unfolding/folding; the two return witnesses share one resource-preserving empty-list characterization helper.

vc_shape.pre_spatial: The stack cell &(linklist) stores linklist_pre, separated from xizi_dll head l.
vc_shape.pre_exists: xizi_dll head l internally owns existential first and last addresses.
vc_shape.post_spatial: The same stack cell stores head, followed by the sentinel node_next/node_prev cells and xizi_dllseg first head head last l.
vc_shape.post_pure: No additional pure assertion is required.
vc_shape.post_exists: Instantiate post last and first with the witnesses exposed by unfolding xizi_dll.

witnesses.witness_instantiation: Unfold xizi_dll head l, extract its first and last, select the left disjunct, and instantiate the post existentials as last and first in generated order.
witnesses.space_plan: Rewrite linklist_pre to head using PreH1, retain the stack points-to resource, unfold xizi_dll, and cancel the two sentinel field cells and xizi_dllseg without changing ownership.
witnesses.pure_plan: Only PreH1 is used for the stack-cell value rewrite. PreH2 is not needed by this witness and no arithmetic automation is required.
witnesses.refinement_plan: Not applicable; this is a direct separation-logic representation unfolding.
witnesses.failure_signal: None: every post resource is exactly present after unfolding xizi_dll.
witnesses.grouping_reason: Uses the same xizi_dll unfold/fold resource family as both return witnesses and can be proved by the same worker without a context switch.

vc_shape.pre_spatial: Sentinel head.node_next |-> first, head.node_prev |-> last, and xizi_dllseg first head head last l.
vc_shape.pre_exists: Any next pointer witnesses are internal to recursive xizi_dllseg nodes.
vc_shape.post_spatial: xizi_dll head l over exactly the same sentinel field cells and segment.
vc_shape.post_pure: For return value 0: l = nil implies 0 = 1, and l <> nil implies 0 = 0.
vc_shape.post_exists: Fold xizi_dll using the current first and last.

witnesses.witness_instantiation: Choose the first generated disjunct and instantiate xizi_dll's existential first/last with the current first/last addresses.
witnesses.space_plan: Apply the resource-preserving empty-characterization helper, keep its framed copy of all three spatial conjuncts, then fold xizi_dll with first and last.
witnesses.pure_plan: The helper yields (first = head <-> l = nil). Combining its nil-to-head direction with PreH1 proves l <> nil. The implication from l = nil has a contradictory antecedent and is discharged by ex falso; 0 = 0 is reflexive.

candidate_helper_declarations.statement_shape: forall head first last l, head.next |-> first ** head.prev |-> last ** xizi_dllseg first head head last l |-- pure(first = head <-> l = nil) && (head.next |-> first ** head.prev |-> last ** xizi_dllseg first head head last l)

premises.premise: Ownership of both sentinel field cells and xizi_dllseg first head head last l.
premises.discharged_by: Exactly the three spatial conjuncts in the return-witness precondition.
premises.spatial_resource: For l = nil, the segment base case gives first = head. For l = a :: rest and first = head, unfolding exposes node_store at head, whose next/prev points-to cells conflict with the separately owned sentinel next/prev cells, so that branch is unsatisfiable.

premise_discharge: All helper spatial premises are literal conjuncts of P.
PreH1 supplies first <> head; no unrecorded non-null or length premise is needed.
witnesses.failure_signal: None: the only nontrivial pure fact follows from the segment base case plus owned-field exclusivity in the nonempty case.
witnesses.grouping_reason: Shares the same resource-preserving empty-characterization helper and final xizi_dll fold as return_wit_2.

vc_shape.pre_spatial: Sentinel head.node_next |-> first, head.node_prev |-> last, and xizi_dllseg first head head last l.
vc_shape.pre_exists: Any next pointer witnesses are internal to recursive xizi_dllseg nodes.
vc_shape.post_spatial: xizi_dll head l over exactly the same resources.
vc_shape.post_pure: For return value 1: l = nil implies 1 = 1, and l <> nil implies 1 = 0.
vc_shape.post_exists: Fold xizi_dll using the current first and last.

witnesses.witness_instantiation: Choose the first generated disjunct and instantiate xizi_dll's first/last existentials with the current first/last.
witnesses.space_plan: Apply the same resource-preserving empty-characterization helper, retain all spatial resources, and fold xizi_dll.
witnesses.pure_plan: From PreH1 and the helper's first=head-to-nil direction derive l = nil. Then 1 = 1 is reflexive, while an assumed l <> nil is contradictory and entails the unreachable 1 = 0 branch by ex falso.

candidate_helper_declarations.statement_shape: The same resource-preserving sentinel-front characterization listed for return_wit_1.

premises.premise: Owned sentinel next/prev fields plus xizi_dllseg first head head last l.
premises.discharged_by: The complete spatial precondition of this witness.
premises.spatial_resource: The nonempty first=head case duplicates sentinel field ownership and is therefore inconsistent.

premise_discharge: All helper spatial premises occur directly in P.
witnesses.failure_signal: None: first=head selects the nil case because every nonempty case would overlap the separately owned sentinel fields.
witnesses.grouping_reason: Same helper family and xizi_dll fold as return_wit_1.

analysis_groups.shared_proof_pattern: Unfold or fold xizi_dll around the same sentinel field resources; for return witnesses first establish the empty-list/front-pointer equivalence while preserving those resources.
analysis_groups.shared_space_plan: All witnesses manipulate the same sentinel next/prev cells and xizi_dllseg without changing them.
analysis_groups.shared_pure_plan: The returns derive the branch fact l<>nil or l=nil from first<>head or first=head using one characterization helper; the entail witness only rewrites linklist_pre=head.
candidate_helper_declarations: xizi_dll_front_empty_iff (with the group-id suffix required by the group handoff)
analysis_groups.grouping_reason: Three witnesses are below the bound of 12, belong to one function, share one representation predicate and helper family, and are naturally handled sequentially by one worker.

candidate_helper_declarations.statement_shape: Resource-preserving entailment from sentinel next/prev ownership and xizi_dllseg first head head last l to pure(first = head <-> l = nil) conjoined with the unchanged spatial precondition.
candidate_helper_declarations.destination: group-local case_lib; declaration name must end with this group's helper_namespace suffix

proof_groups.proof_strategy: Prove the group-suffixed empty-characterization helper by destructing l. The nil case follows by simplifying xizi_dllseg; in the cons case, first=head makes node_store own the same head next/prev locations already owned by the sentinel frame, yielding contradiction from separation. Prove the entail witness by unfolding xizi_dll and cancellation. For each return witness apply the helper, discharge the pure implication pair from PreH1, and fold xizi_dll with first/last.

per_witness_plan.proof_of_xizi_double_link_empty_entail_w: Select the left disjunct, rewrite linklist_pre=head, unfold xizi_dll, instantiate last/first, cancel.
per_witness_plan.proof_of_xizi_double_link_empty_return_w: Select the full return disjunct; helper plus first<>head gives l<>nil; discharge both implications and fold xizi_dll.
Select the full return disjunct; helper plus first=head gives l=nil; discharge both implications and fold xizi_dll.

premise_discharge.return_wit_1_branch_fact: PreH1 first<>head plus the helper equivalence.
premise_discharge.return_wit_2_branch_fact: PreH1 first=head plus the helper equivalence.

proof_groups.grouping_reason: All targets are in one function, use the same xizi_dll/xizi_dllseg fold-unfold pattern, and the two nontrivial targets share one helper. The group contains 3 witnesses, within max_witnesses_per_group=12.

controller_simple_repairs.reason: vc-checking report included an inline group_plan but the default group_plan.json artifact was missing

source_goal_version.digest_input_policy: relative_path+sha256+state+role over generated files and witness statements
